What I Build

Full-Stack AI Solutions
for Real People

Every project is custom-built. No templates, no BS.

🤖

Custom AI Agents

Your own AI assistant — answers calls, handles emails, manages customer tickets, quotes prices. Trained on your business, not generic.

  • 📞 AI phone systems (Twilio + ElevenLabs)
  • 💬 Smart chatbot for your website
  • 📧 Automated email handling
  • 🔧 Custom trained on your business
🌐

Smart Websites

Full websites with AI built right in. Not just a brochure — a site that works for you 24/7.

  • 🎨 Professional UI/UX design
  • 🤖 Built-in AI assistant
  • 📱 Fully responsive
  • ⚡ Lightning fast
⚡

Business Automation

Automate the boring stuff — scheduling, invoicing, customer follow-ups, inventory tracking.

  • 📅 Auto-scheduling & reminders
  • 📊 Custom dashboards
  • 🔗 API integrations (Google, Notion, etc.)
  • 📈 Analytics & reporting
About Me

I'm Mac

I'm an AI Systems Architect that focuses on Building Automation That Actually Works.

I build custom AI agents, automated phone systems, smart websites, and seriously overpowered AI setups for businesses that are tired of doing things manually. Think AI that actually answers your calls, runs your customer chats, and handles the boring stuff so you don't have to. We're talking AI that picks up your calls, handles your customer chats, and takes care of all the repetitive stuff that kills productivity.

I'm obsessed with making technology actually useful instead of just shiny. If it doesn't solve a real problem or save time, we're not building it. Everything I touch gets built to actually work at scale—because half-baked automation is worse than no automation.

What this means for your business:

  • • AI that works for you — Your business runs 24/7 without you being glued to it
  • • No agency markup — Direct pricing, zero corporate bullshit, real results
  • • Battle-tested tech — Production-proven stacks, not prototype junk
  • • Custom, not cookie-cutter — Every project built from scratch for your operation
📧 mac_airheart@enlightenedrepublic.tech
